title: Block Break Percent
description: Shows the percentage of the block broken under your crosshair
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f318ade1340baffb91f387fee22ff6b20c89a13d.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

When breaking a block, the progress of how far it's broken is shown under your crosshair (In percent
